testcase.name: test_every_node_typed_handler_has_validity_guard_or_annotation
testcase.failure: Node-typed signal handlers must have validity guards or lint-ignore annotations. Failures: res://src/ui/hud_state_signaling.gd:180 → handler `func _on_alert_state_changed(actor: Node, _old_state: int, new_state: int, _severity: int) -> void:` lacks is_instance_valid(actor) guard and has no @lint-ignore annotation
